prompt: Write an email to a hotel to change your reservation dates.
instruction_id: Tulis email formal ke hotel untuk mengubah tanggal reservasimu. Jelaskan alasan perubahan tersebut dengan sopan.
sampleAnswer: Dear Sir/Madam, I am writing to request a change to my reservation (Booking Ref: 12345). Due to an unexpected change in my flight schedule, I would like to move my stay from July 10th-12th to July 12th-14th. I hope this is possible and apologize for any inconvenience caused. I look forward to your reply.
tip_id: Gunakan frasa pembuka 'I am writing to' dan penutup 'I look forward to your reply'.
